Veterans Benefits: Pennsylvania does not tax qualifying military retirement pay or VA disability benefits and offers a real-estate-tax exemption to eligible disabled wartime veterans and qualifying surviving spouses; eligibility and financial-need criteria apply.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Municipal Equality Index; Pittsburgh received 100. MAP Pennsylvania LGBTQ Policy Score: 16.75/49 (Fair).
Description: Pittsburgh is a compact three-rivers city with major hospital and university anchors, a full-service VA medical center, strong LGBTQ municipal policy, and extensive arts, sports, trail and park access. Its relatively attainable housing and tax treatment of qualifying retirement income are balanced by gray, snowy winters, humid summers, 7% sales tax, and a 2024 violent-crime rate above the national rate. Political percentages use Allegheny County because the curated election source is county-level.
